name: Chicken & Shrimp Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 large frying chicken, cut into serving pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge the chicken in flour.
2. Brown the chicken lightly in a skillet.
3. Place the chicken in a casserole dish.
4. Saute the onion lightly.
5. Add garlic, tomato sauce, salt, pepper, basil, parsley, paprika, minced clams with liquid, mushrooms, and sherry to the casserole.
6. Simmer for 10 minutes.
7. Pour the sauce over the chicken.
8. Cover and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour.
9. When ready to serve, uncover the casserole.
10. Add shrimp to the casserole and cover with sauce.
11. Bake for an additional 10 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
12. Serves 6. Can be served over rice.
